title: Bigger sidebar to show boards and folders complete in workspace
excerpt:
Hello, 
when we work with monday we always have a problem how boards and folders are visualized in workspace on the left side. 
Its way too small and shows only parts of the boards names. Heres an example: 
  
Is it poss…

posts.author: StefanF (Stefan Franke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

when we work with monday we always have a problem how boards and folders are visualized in workspace on the left side.
Its way too small and shows only parts of the boards names. Heres an example:

grafik496×754 44.9 KB

Is it possible to get a workspace bar on the left that we can drag with mouse to make it bigger or smaller on the screeen? Sorry for the bad explanation in english, i hope you understand my idea.

Thx!
Stefan

posts.author: lucasr (Lucas)
posts.cookedHtml: `Yes, please. I want to pull my 40-person team off the platform simply because mentally it is taxing to not be able to view all the board names in a single view. For some workspaces this is analogous to having the titles of every project name over 50% hidden unless you hover over it. I hate the experience.

posts.author: gurabelo (Gustavo Rabelo)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, please. This is a simple request and will make a big difference.

posts.author: Marn (Marnie@twgcommunications.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes this would help us immensely as we number our dockets and can not read the fu;; file name.

posts.author: Mel_Schulien (Mel S.)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking for this request as well; our project names are very long and would love to be able to extend the sidebar.

Thank you!

posts.author: StefanF (Stefan Franke)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks to monday Team! The new Feature is here and incredible! Really nice how users are heard and the software is getting better and better!
